title: Inside the UFO hotel in Wales - with 'spacecraft' door, NASA-designed interiors and Doctor Who TARDIS bathroom
description: The awe-inspiring Spodnic UFO at Melin Mabes, a four-acre glamping site, will be featured on an upcoming episode of World's Most Secret Hotels.

title: UFO mystery remains vivid in the memory
description: The elusive silver disc that danced in the blue sky over Westall in 1966 still sears in observers’ memories. Joy Clarke, a former Westall High School student at the time, bristles at those who dismiss what she and more than 300 others saw in broad daylight 60 years ago. “I have nothing to lie about. [...]

title: Kacey Musgraves has hilarious response to ‘UFO analyst’ debunking her space sighting
description: ‘Space Cowboy’ singer said she saw suspicious orbs on her flight from Texas to Nashville

title: Nearly a century of wondering: The American UFO saga, in reality and in fiction
description: Sightings and investigations date back to the first widely reported one in 1947.
